cd.t:
n. 镭射碟, 镭射唱片
[计] 光盘, 压缩盘, 载波检测, DOS内部命令:显示或改变当前目录
cd.d:
n a soft bluish-white ductile malleable toxic bivalent metallic element; occurs in association with zinc ores
n the basic unit of luminous intensity adopted under the Systeme International d'Unites; equal to 1/60 of the luminous intensity per square centimeter of a black body radiating at the temperature of 2,046 degrees Kelvin
n a debt instrument issued by a bank; usually pays interest
n a digitally encoded recording on an optical disk that is smaller than a phonograph record; played back by a laser
s being one hundred more than three hundred

cd drive.t: [网络] 光驱；光盘驱动器；光驱品牌分类

cd-r.t: n. 可记录光盘驱动器

cd-rom.d: n a compact disk that is used with a computer (rather than with an audio system); a large amount of digital information can be stored and accessed but it cannot be altered by the user

cd-rom disk drive.t: [计] CD-ROM光盘驱动器, CD-ROM盘驱动器

cd-roms.t: (CD-ROM 的复数) n.光盘驱动器
cd-roms.d:
plural of CD-ROM
n a compact disk that is used with a computer (rather than with an audio system); a large amount of digital information can be stored and accessed but it cannot be altered by the user

cd-rs.t: n. 可记录光盘驱动器( CD-R的名词复数 )

cd-rw.t: abbr. 可复写式光盘机（rewritable compact disk）

cd-rws.t: n. 可重写光碟( CD-RW的名词复数 )

cd-wo.t: abbr. 一次写入型光盘（Compact Disk-Write Once）

cd4.t: abbr. CD4细胞；CD4抗艾滋病药（Cluster of Differentiation 4）
cd4.d: n. a glycoprotein that is found primarily on the surface of helper T cells

cda.t: abbr. 指令数据截获（Command and Data Acquisition）

cdb.t: abbr. 国家开发银行（China Development Bank）；通用数据总线（Common Data Bus）；加勒比开发银行（Caribbean Development Bank）

cdbg.t: abbr. Community Development Block Grant 地区开发固定拨款

cdc.t: abbr. 疾病防治中心（Centers for Disease Control）；（美）市民民防团（Citizens ' Defense Corps）；控制数据公司（Control Data Corp）
cdc.d: n a federal agency in the Department of Health and Human Services; located in Atlanta; investigates and diagnoses and tries to control or prevent diseases (especially new and unusual diseases)

cdcs.t: abbr. Centralized Digital Control System 中央数字控制系统

cde.t: abbr. code 密码; carbon dioxide economizer 二氧化碳节约装置; canine distemper encephalitis 犬瘟热脑炎; contamination-decontamination experiment 污染-净化实验

cdec.t: [化] 硫烯草丹; 草克死

cdf.t: abbr. cumulative distribution function 累计分布函数; command decoder film 命令译码器胶片; command decoder fiter 指令译码滤波器; cerebellar deficient folia 小脑皮层缺如

cdfs.t: abbr. CD-ROM file system 只读存储光盘文件系统; Chief of Defence Force Staff 三军总长; compact disc file system 光盘文件系统

cdg.t: abbr. 巴黎机场（Paris Charles de Gaulle Airport）；危险品运输（Carriage of Dangerous Goods）；图示激光唱片

cdh.t: abbr. constant differential height 常微分顶点

cdhp.t: abbr. California Dental Health Plan 加利福尼亚牙科健康计划; command and data handling package 指令和数据运用（软件）组

cdhs.t: abbr. comprehensive data handling system 综合数据处理系统

cdi.t: abbr. 航向偏差指示器（Course Deviation Indicator）；综合报告索引（Comprehensive Dissertation Index）

cdm.t: abbr. [电信学]代码分隔多路通信制（Code Division Multiplexing）；自动存款机（Cash Deposit Machine）；清洁发展机制（Clean Development Mechanism）；消费者直购销售模式（Comsumer Direct Marketing）

cdma.t: abbr. 分码多重进接, 码分多址（Code Division Multiple Access）

cdms.t: [医][=cyclohexane dimethanol succinate]环己烷二甲醇琥珀酸酯

cdn.t: abbr. 内容分发网络（Content Distribution Network）；内容传递网络（Content Delivery Network）；芝加哥每日新闻（报纸名, Chicago Daily News）；统一数据网络（Consolidated Data Network）；双源距补偿中子测井（Compensated Dual Neutron Log）

cdna.d: n single-stranded DNA that is complementary to messenger RNA or DNA that has been synthesized from messenger RNA by reverse transcriptase

cdnas.d:
plural of cDNA
n single-stranded DNA that is complementary to messenger RNA or DNA that has been synthesized from messenger RNA by reverse transcriptase

cdo.t: abbr. 开发总监（Chief Development Officer）；债务抵押债券（Collateralized Debt Obligation）；协作数据对象（Collaboration Data Objects）

cdos.t: (cdo 的复数) abbr. 开发总监（Chief Development Officer）；债务抵押债券（Collateralized Debt Obligation）；协作数据对象（Collaboration Data Objects）

cdot.t: abbr. continuous domiciliary oxygen therapy 连续的家庭氧治疗

cdpd.t: abbr. cellular digital packet data 蜂窝式数字包裹数据传输

cdq.t: abbr. choice dilemmas questionnaire 困境选择问卷调查表; chronic Disease Quarterly 慢性病季刊; cultural distance questionnaire 文化距离问卷调查表

cdr.t: abbr. 指挥员（Commander）；会长（commander）；交货收据（Cargo Delivery Receipt）

cdrc.t: abbr. Civil Defence Regional Commissioner 地区民防专员; conductivity-recording controller 电导率记录控制器

cdrh.t: n. 设备仪器与放射健康中心，是FDA的下属机构，负责美国境内医疗设备

cdrom.t: abbr. 只读光盘（CD-Read Only Memory）

cdrs.t: abbr. control and data retrieval system 控制与数据检索系统; children depression rating scale 儿童抑郁症等级评定量表; Cornell dysthymia rating scale 康奈尔精神抑郁症等级量表; clinical dementia rating scale 临床痴呆等级量表

cds.t: abbr. 中央动态存贮器（Central Dynamic Store）；集装箱运货系（Container Delivery System）；冷拉无缝（Cold Drawn Seamless）；受控供电系统（Controlled Delivery System）
cds.d:
n a soft bluish-white ductile malleable toxic bivalent metallic element; occurs in association with zinc ores
n the basic unit of luminous intensity adopted under the Systeme International d'Unites; equal to 1/60 of the luminous intensity per square centimeter of a black body radiating at the temperature of 2,046 degrees Kelvin
n a debt instrument issued by a bank; usually pays interest
n a digitally encoded recording on an optical disk that is smaller than a phonograph record; played back by a laser

cdsc.t: [医][=Communicable Disease Surveillance Center]传染病监视中心

cdss.t: abbr. compressed data storage system 压缩数据存储系统

cdt.t: abbr. （美国）中央时区（Central Daylight Time）

cdtv.t: abbr. compact disk television 光碟电视; conventional definition television 常规清晰度电视

cdu.t: abbr. 中央显示器（Central Display Unit）；海防搜索潜艇雷达（Coast Defense radar for detecting U-boats）

cdv.t: abbr. carte de visite (Spanish=visiting card, sometimes with photograph) （西班牙语）名片; cadaver 死尸; computed dollar value 计算的美元价值; current domestic value 线形国内价值

cdw.t: abbr. 电荷密度波（Charge Density Wave）；车辆碰撞险（Collision Damage Waiver）

cdwr.t: abbr. California Department of Water Resources 加利福尼亚水利资源局

cdws.t: abbr. Civil Defense Wardens Service 民防看守服务
